lastReleaseMessage: core label designer complete; Symbol + label polish milestone done; .git bloat locked Won't-fix in spec; review cadence to weekly constellation-only

barRaise.topFinding: Both carry-over decide-not-fix items are now resolved and the project is at v1.0. v1.0 (1.0.0) is cut from 0.18.5, the "Symbol + label polish" milestone is marked done, and the core label designer is feature-complete at 100 percent. The 864 MB .git bloat is closed as a Won't-fix locked decision in PROJECT_SPEC section 8: the 40 raw data/ingredients PNGs in history cost nothing operationally (deploy is a mirror, not a clone), and a force-push history rewrite on the FUSE workspace is not worth the risk; the strip recipe plus a verified pre-filter bundle backup are on hand if a clean clone is ever needed. Apothecary now moves to weekly, constellation-only review, dropping the daily per-project bar-raise that was producing reprints rather than signal. No open actions remain.
